d.description: Research subsecond crate for Rust HMR. Understand: jump table approach, ThinLink linker, limitations (no struct layout changes). Evaluate fit for motif renderer.
d.title: Investigate subsecond for hot reloading

d.description: Identify which functions should be hot-reloadable. Likely candidates: view render methods, element paint methods. Need stable function signatures.
d.title: Design hot-reloadable render function boundary

d.description: Add subsecond::call() wrappers to playground/buttons examples. Test hot reload of render logic changes. Document limitations.
d.title: Integrate subsecond into motif examples
Optimize hot reload dev profile for faster iteration
